message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **Validation Tocken**

participant "RemoteServiceServlet" as RSS <<C>>
participant "HttpSessionCollector" as HSC <<C>>
participant "SysLog" as SL <<L>>
participant "Validation_User" as VU

[-> RSS : Data Request
activate RSS

RSS -> RSS : Get Session ID_client

RSS -> HSC : Get Session by ID_client
activate HSC
RSS <-- HSC : Session
deactivate HSC

RSS -> RSS : Validation Tockens\n<color:green>**True**</color>

activate RSS #darkgreen
RSS -> VU : Access success

deactivate RSS

RSS -> RSS : Validation Tockens\n<color:red>**False**</color>

activate RSS #red
RSS -[#orange]> SL : Tocken Failure (Name, Time)

[<-- RSS : Access denied
deactivate RSS

deactivate RSS
@enduml
```
